_doc.receptivity: How much incoming signal feelings influence reaction. 0=deaf, 1=fully empathetic. Additive: blended = self + α×signal
_doc.resonanceReceiveScale: Multiplier on all incoming resonance. 1.0=full, 0.3=dampened (e.g. anchor)
_doc.selectionBias: Multiplier on cosine score when this species selects a target. >1=prefer, <1=avoid, 0=never. Applied as: effectiveScore = cosine × selectionBias[target.species]
_doc.mergeTargetBias: How likely this species is to be selected as a merge target. 1.0=normal, 0=never. Target-side (vs selectionBias which is initiator-side)
_doc.behavior: signal-primary consolidator. signals actively to build resonance, accepts incoming merges passively. bequeath shares TTL with kin. decay reduced for w runway

_doc.receptivity: Moderate — senses sender health via blended feelings. Healthy sender (high vigor) → accept bias
_doc.resonanceReceiveScale: Multiplier on all incoming resonance. 1.0=full, 0.3=dampened (e.g. anchor)
_doc.selectionBias: Multiplier on cosine score when this species selects a target. sentinel monitors anchor (1.2), avoids spore (0.7)
_doc.mergeTargetBias: How likely this species is to be selected as a merge target. 1.0=normal, 0=never
_doc.behavior: survive-oriented watchdog. reduced hostility (reject/retaliate softened). accepts signals from healthy senders via receptivity=0.5

_doc.receptivity: High — social species, highly influenced by incoming emotional signals
_doc.resonanceReceiveScale: Multiplier on all incoming resonance. 1.0=full, 0.3=dampened (e.g. anchor)
_doc.selectionBias: herald broadcasts widely, prefers spore (1.2, nurture ideas) and summarizer (1.1), avoids anchor (0.3)
_doc.mergeTargetBias: How likely this species is to be selected as a merge target. 1.0=normal, 0=never
_doc.behavior: signal-oriented. sustains through social nourishment. vigor drives signaling. survives when depleted

_doc.receptivity: Minimal — almost deaf to incoming signals, reacts from own state only
_doc.resonanceReceiveScale: 0.3 — dampened to prevent passive resonance accumulation. Anchor accepts all interactions but shouldn't dominate resonance rankings
_doc.selectionBias: anchor rarely initiates social actions. sentinel (1.0) is the only strong target — rule enforcement. all others low. replaces mergeImmune: other species set anchor bias low instead
_doc.mergeTargetBias: 0 — anchor is immovable, never absorbs other nodes' contents. Keeps pure status for pushback filtering. signal+accept still yields resonance (×0.3 dampened); signalAcceptWBoost=0 deliberately — anchor is already near-immortal in-run (TTL 500, decay 0.02) and must not gain w from being a passive signal sink
_doc.behavior: immovable system core (.env, paths, conventions). survive-only initiator — signal/merge/bequeath suppressed by negative weights. near-guaranteed acceptor when targeted — reject/retaliate/flee suppressed. passive knowledge source: quiet but always receptive. merge-immune as target (mergeTargetBias=0)

_doc.receptivity: Highest — fragile, hyper-sensitive to incoming emotional signals
_doc.selectionBias: spore seeks validation: summarizer (1.4, consolidates into knowledge) and herald (1.4, broadcasts). anchor (0.2, deaf wall). sentinel avoided (0.5, reject risk). same-spore avoided (0.6, fragile×fragile = collapse)
_doc.mergeTargetBias: How likely this species is to be selected as a merge target. 1.0=normal, 0=never
_doc.behavior: fragile hypothesis. born from manual push. signals to seek validation. merges under crisis (absorbed into verified knowledge). dies fast without social confirmation. high resonance sensitivity to summarizer+herald (validation paths)
